summary: Comprehensive testing of Nagarik Sahayak (नागरिक सहायक) mobile-first government service app completed successfully. All backend APIs working with 100% success rate. Frontend UI flows tested with complete login, chat, schemes, and profile functionality working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Microphone access denied in automated testing environment - expected behavior
design_issues.note: This is expected in headless browser testing and will work in real user environment

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API Health Check - Nagarik Sahayak API v1.0.0 responding
✅ Authentication Flow - Phone OTP (1234) working for any number
✅ User Profile Management - Create, read, update operations working
✅ Government Schemes API - 3 seeded schemes (PM-KISAN, Ayushman Bharat, Sukanya Samriddhi) with Hindi+English content
✅ Chat Functionality - Rule-based bot responses working, message history stored
✅ LLM/STT Provider Info - 6 LLM providers and 2 STT providers configured
✅ Login UI Flow - Phone input → OTP verification → Home page redirect
✅ Home Page Elements - Welcome banner, mic button, scheme cards, recent chats, bottom navigation
✅ Chat Interface - WhatsApp-style bubbles, message sending, bot responses, double ticks status
✅ Schemes Page - 3 expandable scheme cards with eligibility, benefits, PDF links
✅ Profile Page - Name editing, language selection (Hindi/English), save functionality
✅ Navigation - Bottom nav between Home, Chat, Schemes, Profile working seamlessly
✅ Mobile-First Design - Responsive layout with proper Indian flag, सरकारी योजनाएं branding
✅ Bilingual Support - Hindi + English content throughout the app
✅ Government Scheme Data - Proper PM-KISAN (6,000/year), Ayushman Bharat (5L health cover), Sukanya Samriddhi (8.2% interest) details
